meta.name: Key Switches
meta.description: Key-operated switches for access control and system reset
meta.heroTitle: Key-Operated Switches for Access Control and Signalling
meta.heroDescription:
Low- and high-voltage key switches with various mechanism types and electrical configurations, including single-pole, double-pole, and three-position circuits. Optional protective housing and pre-activation indication available.

The Dual Mount system supports both flush and surface mounting. Supplied with a 35 mm back box.

Intended for indoor access control systems, system reset functions, and authorized switching operations.

Not suitable for outdoor use.

options.CL: #CL Custom labelling in Ukrainian or English (NON-RETURNABLE)
